On December 21st, 2024, I took one of the biggest steps of my life — opening Label Gabriel in Kannur, Alakode. After years of effort and determination since graduating from NIFT (2014–18), what was once a dream slowly shaped into reality.with hard work, patience, and endless hope.

Today, standing inside my boutique, I had one of those surreal deja vu moments. Back in college, we used to go on industrial visits with our professors — wide-eyed, curious, and inspired. And today, life came full circle. My juniors from the FD department, the 4th year batch, walked into my boutique for their own visit… led by none other than my beloved professor, Shankarla ma’am.

I can’t put into words how overwhelming it felt to welcome them here. To see the same curiosity in their eyes that I once carried, and to share with them the story of building something from scratch in a rural place like Kannur. What made it even more special — it was Shankarla ma’am’s birthday. We surprised her with a cake cutting, and the happiness on her face was priceless.

This day will forever stay close to my heart. It’s a reminder that dreams do come true, that hard work and patience have their own timing, and that gratitude is the best way to live this journey. Feeling humbled, proud, and endlessly thankful — to my teachers, my juniors, my team, and to life itself for moments like these.

A lovely couple decided to celebrate their little one's baptism in the most memorable and unforgettable way—just as every parent dreams. They placed their trust in us to make their special moment even more magical, and we made their wish come true, just like the genie in Aladdin 🧞‍♂️.

First and foremost, we confirmed their preferred color choices. They selected white and bone for the baby's dress and wanted everything to blend seamlessly. Based on their preference, we suggested complementary shades and hand-dyed crêpe georgette fabric into a beautiful beige. To enhance the look and feel, we adorned the saree with exquisite handwork, adding an elegant touch. Even the saree blouse was intricately handcrafted, making it a truly one-of-a-kind piece.

Such amazing parents truly deserved something special! Thank you for believing in us—we are always grateful🤗.

So, when will you make your wish with us?

The day of spiritual cleansing! ✨
